admission_requirements.who_can_apply: Applicants from all undergraduate majors, backgrounds, and work experiences.
admission_requirements.gpa_requirement: Minimum 2.80 GPA (students with 2.8-3.0 are welcome to apply).
admission_requirements.programming_experience: Not required to apply. Implementation course is a degree requirement (levels available from beginner to advanced).

program_details.online_availability: Yes, can be completed entirely online (assignments, discussions, tests via Canvas).

transition_to_mhci.eligibility: Must apply and meet admission requirements for Master of HCI.
transition_to_mhci.credit_transfer: Credits earned towards certificate may be counted towards online MHCI degree requirements.

delivery_formats.asynchronous: Flexible, no set meetings, weekly coursework on Canvas.
delivery_formats.synchronous: Live virtual lectures at fixed times (usually evenings >5pm CT), mandatory attendance.

workload.full_time_workers: Plan to take 1-2 courses (no more than 2).
workload.pacing: Not self-paced; strict due dates for activities, assignments, and exams.

semester_length.summer: 8 weeks (Session I/II) or 12 weeks (Full Session); shorter and faster paced.

application_process.response_time: 1-2 weeks after application is considered complete.

career_info.job_placement: No direct assistance/placement offered by program. Students directed to Graduate College Career Services.
career_info.student_profile: Mix of professionals already in the field and those looking to transition into UX/UI or HCI roles.
